geographic_restrictions: Primarily U.S.-based programs with state-specific eligibility; some federal programs apply nationwide.
project_area: Childcare support for families to cover costs of safe and nurturing childcare environments, including daycare centers, in-home care, and after-school programs.
demographic_requirements: Families must meet income thresholds (often up to 185% of the federal poverty level), have children under a certain age (commonly 13 years), and may require proof of employment, residency, or special needs for enhanced eligibility.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility is primarily based on income level (typically not exceeding 185% of the federal poverty level), employment or educational status of parents, age of children (often under 13), residency within the state or locality offering the grant, and special needs considerations. Some programs prioritize single parents, low-income families, or those in job training.
